name: Malevola Gibb
description:
Perhaps I'm... I'm in over my head.

First bot got some good traction and I enjoyed making it, so I wanted to do another. I've seen some good Malevola bots on this platform, but honestly nothing that really interested me past a few messages since I'm picky. So, I'm giving my own take on Malevola now.

__________________________________________________

As always, give me feedback in the comments, tell me anything I can change with my tokens in order for a higher quality chat, or even just say something at all in the comments.
creator: Noname323
